branch_attribution.method: Sequential git bisect using the retained ONNX files and requiring the TFLite accuracy report for both semantic candidates.

root_causes.cause: The indexed candidate guard rejected compatible fan-out where one corrected NCHW Concat/activation tensor feeds multiple [0,2,3,1] Transpose-to-Conv branches.
root_causes.pre_fix_runtime_error: LiteRT CONV_2D node 454 rejected input/filter channel divisibility: 192 != 0.

root_causes.cause: The indexed candidate guard required embedded ndarray filter storage and rejected the QLinearConv lowering form where a constant INT8 filter is shape-preservingly CAST to the runtime FLOAT32 Conv filter.
root_causes.pre_fix_runtime_error: LiteRT CONV_2D node 1324 rejected input/filter channel divisibility: 24 != 0.

changes: Allow fan-out only when every sibling consumer is the same constant [0,2,3,1] Transpose contract or a Conv/TransposeConv data consumer with the same required input-channel count.
Continue rejecting public boundary tensors, unrelated side consumers, produced permutation tensors, duplicate producers, incompatible filter channels, and dynamic/non-constant filter storage.
Accept only the strict constant-source CAST filter form in addition to embedded ndarray filters.
Collect every compatible repair plan against the unchanged graph before applying plans, so all sibling branch metadata is updated consistently.
new_unit_contracts: existing unsafe fan-out and produced-filter rejection matrix

fb_refactor5_post_fix.assessment: Known numeric non-pass restored exactly; executable TFLite and accuracy report restored.
Pass restored with a byte-identical float32 TFLite artifact relative to origin/main.

hybridnets_timing_attribution.assessment: One-off runtime variance; no branch-specific semantic or performance regression and no exclusion added.

tests.command: Focused sequential conversion of the two semantic candidates after the final guard change
tests.result: imageclassifier pass; text_detection known numeric fail restored; SWAP 0

tests.command: Focused sequential conversion of four already-passing structural neighbors
tests.result: 4 passed; all four float32 TFLite hashes unchanged; SWAP 0

full_corpus_rerun.reason: The user requested minimal conversion testing while prioritizing fixes. The full 49-model pre-fix run is retained, and post-fix validation was limited to the affected models, four structural neighbors, and the timing candidate.
